name: sritech-engineering
description: Sri Tech Engineering – Production-ready website with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build:prod: npm run build --prefix frontend && echo '✅ Front-end built. Copy frontend/dist/ contents to Hostinger public_html/'
scripts.deploy:hostinger: npm run build:prod && echo '🚀 HYBRID DEPLOYMENT: 1. Render backend pings automatically. 2. Upload dist/ to Hostinger. 3. Ensure frontend/.env.production has your Render URL.'
